query:
SELECT 
  sc.id AS confirmation_id,
  s.supplierName,
  sc.dailySchedule,
  sc.status
FROM supplier_confirmations sc
JOIN suppliers s ON s.id = sc.supplierId
WHERE sc.planId = (SELECT id FROM material_plans WHERE fileName LIKE '%1月5日-2月13日%' LIMIT 1)
  AND s.supplierName LIKE '%江苏如意%'
LIMIT 1;
